disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No menstrual period for about six months, then a sudden onset of heavy vaginal bleeding tonight
trigger_question_examples: Tell me about the bleeding tonight.
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I hadn't had a period for six months and then tonight out of nowhere I started bleeding really heavily.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Severe cramping lower abdominal pain for about 12 hours, bilateral, worsening
trigger_question_examples: Where is the pain and how bad is it?
How long has the pain been going on?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: It's a really bad cramping pain low down across my whole lower stomach, on both sides, and it's been getting worse for about half a day.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Bleeding is heavy — soaking roughly two pads per hour
trigger_question_examples: How many pads are you going through each hour?
Are you passing any large clots?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I'm soaking through about two pads every hour, it just keeps coming.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Possibility of pregnancy has not been excluded by the patient; sexual activity not disclosed unless sensitively asked; no pregnancy test done
trigger_question_examples: Is there any chance at all you could be pregnant?
Have you been sexually active, and have you done a pregnancy test?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I don't really know... I haven't done a test. I suppose it's possible, I hadn't thought about that because I haven't had periods.
disclosure_items.patient_deflection_template: Do we have to talk about that? My mum is right here.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Long history of excess coarse hair on the face and lower abdomen and refractory acne
trigger_question_examples: Have you noticed any changes in hair growth or skin?
Tell me about your general health over the last year or two.
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I've got a lot of dark hair on my chin and upper lip and my lower tummy, and really bad acne that never clears no matter what I use.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Central weight gain over the past couple of years and dark velvety patches on the back of the neck
trigger_question_examples: Have you had any weight changes or skin changes?
Have you noticed any darkening of the skin anywhere?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I've put on weight around my middle and there are these dark, kind of velvety patches on the back of my neck.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Currently no fainting, no dizziness on standing and no palpitations reported (haemodynamic red-flag screen at this moment)
trigger_question_examples: Have you felt faint, dizzy when standing, or had your heart racing?
Have you passed out or felt like you might?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No, I haven't fainted or felt dizzy standing up, and my heart doesn't feel like it's racing — I'm just in a lot of pain and really upset.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Low mood, marked emotional distress and anxiety about fertility
trigger_question_examples: How have you been feeling in yourself and your mood?
What are you most worried about tonight?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I've been really down for a while, and tonight I'm terrified — I keep thinking this means I'll never be able to have kids.
